title: Annual Tech Hackathon 2026
description: Compete in 24-hour innovation challenge. Build solutions for smart campus problems. Teams of 2–4 allowed. Prize pool: $5,000.

title: Final Examination Period
description: Semester-end exams across all departments. Refer to individual exam schedules on the student portal.

title: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop on real-world ML applications and neural networks. Certificate of completion provided.
